return a number 1 more than the argument
incrementWaitlistCount_increasesByOne() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that incrementWaitlistCount increases the current waitlist count by one.

test to see if event creation is prevented when the input fields are missing information

adapter for displaying invitation status in RecyclerView manages the mapping between invitation data and view holders

constructs InvitationAdapter with a list of invitation maps

ViewHolder class for invitation list items connects UI components to data

integrated tests for the private event invitation system verifies that invitations are correctly sent, tracked, and responded to
InvitationIntegrationTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.InvitationIntegrationTest
 
InvitationStatusActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Activity for displaying the status of invitations sent for private event shows list of users and whether they have accepted, rejected, or pending

returns whether an event should be visible on the current events screen

Returns whether the comment has been soft-deleted.
isHost(EventItem, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
checks if the given user is the host of a Event

gets whether coorganizer invite notifications are enabled
isOptInOtherNotifications() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfile
gets whether other notifications are enabled
isOptInPrivateInvites() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfile
gets whether private event invite notifications are enabled
isOptInWinningNotifications() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfile
gets whether winning notifications are enabled

getter for public/private visibility

getter for requiresGeolocation boolean
isTopLevel() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentItem
Returns whether the comment is a top-level comment.
isWaitlistJoinOpen(boolean, Date, Date) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
returns whether the (is waitlist open and it is before the deadline)
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsFalse_whenDeadlinePassed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered closed when the registration deadline has already passed.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsFalse_whenWaitlistClosed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered closed when the waitlist flag is false, even if the registration deadline is still in the future.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsTrue_whenOpenAndDeadlineInFuture() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered open when the waitlist flag is true and the registration deadline is in the future.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsTrue_whenOpenAndDeadlineNull() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered open when the waitlist flag is true and no registration deadline has been set.
isWaitlistOpen() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventItem
getter for waitlistOpen boolean
